items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Cavaliers 118, Warriors 111 — Donovan Mitchell scored a team-high 25 points, Max Strus added 24, and the Cleveland Cavaliers earned a 118-111 victory over the Golden State Warriors.

items.headline: NBA Highlights: Trail Blazers 118, Pelicans 106
items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Trail Blazers 118, Pelicans 106 — Jrue Holiday poured in a game-high 27 points, while Deni Avdija added 26 of his own as the Portland Trail Blazers earned a 118-106 win over the New Orleans Pelicans. Jeremiah Fears posted a team-high 21 points off the bench in the loss.

items.headline: NBA Highlights: Pistons 113, Timberwolves 108
items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Pistons 113, Timberwolves 108 — Daniss Jenkins registered 26 points and eight assists, Jalen Duren tallied a double-double of 22 points and 14 rebounds, and Ausar Thompson’s nine assists were a career-high in the Detroit Pistons’ 113-108 victory over the Minnesota Timberwolves.

items.headline: NBA Highlights: Hornets 127, Suns 107
items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Hornets 127, Suns 107 — Miles Bridges scored 25 points, Kon Knueppel added 20, and Coby White in 20 minutes off the bench dropped 19 points as the Charlotte Hornets scored 69 points over the second and third quarters on their way to a 127-107 win over the Phoenix Suns.

items.headline: Luka Doncic, Jalen Johnson Named NBA Players Of March
items.blurb: Luka Doncic, Jalen Johnson Named NBA Players Of March — Luka Doncic and Jalen Johnson have been named the NBA's Players of the Month for March. Doncic averaged 37.5 points, 8.0 rebounds and 7.4 assists as the Los Angeles Lakers went 15-2. Doncic previously won the award in January. items.blurb: Ausar Thompson, Victor Wembanyama Named NBA Defensive Players Of March — Ausar Thompson and Victor Wembanyama have been named the NBA's Defensive Players of the Month for March.
